allow: Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); sales=[p for p in d[''paths''] if ''sales'' in p or ''purchase'' in p or ''supplier'' in p or ''automation'' in p or ''finance'' in p]; print\(''Rotas novas:'', sales[:20]\)")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object {$_CommandLine -like ''*uvicorn*'' -or $_CommandLine -like ''*main:app*''} | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine")
